Chapter I
The Adventures of Captain ScalleyWag
He opened his eyes — and found himself staring into the eyes of an enormous white beast. The wolf bared its teeth. Drool dripped onto ScalleyWag's face. The pirate stayed absolutely still. He reached for his knife. Gone.
— Chapter 1, Book I Get the Complete Series

What Readers Are Saying

Parents & Kids Love It

★★★★★

My son refused to put it down. He read the first book in one sitting and immediately asked for the next one. That never happens in our house.

— Parent, Amazon Review

★★★★★

We read it together at bedtime and my daughter was hooked from the first page. The humor is just right — kids laugh out loud, and so do the parents.

— Parent, Goodreads

★★★★★

Captain ScalleyWag is the kind of character kids remember for years. Funny, brave, and always getting into trouble in the best possible way.

Meet the Authors

The Minds Behind
Captain ScalleyWag

Kristi Copeland Beyer and Jean Holland Copeland are a mother-daughter author duo who share a passion for storytelling that sparks imagination in young readers. Together they have crafted a world of swashbuckling adventure that keeps kids reading page after page.

Published by Copeland Publishing, The Adventures of Captain ScalleyWag is their signature series — built to be read aloud, read alone, or passed between siblings.

Kristi Copeland Beyer & Jean Holland Copeland
